sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 19.101 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.19)

statement.latex: The maximum length of a chain of nested centralizers of a group is called its$c$-dimension. Let$G$be a locally finite group of finite$c$-dimension$k$, and let$S$be the preimage in$G$of the socle of$G/R$, where$R$is the locally solvable radical of~$G$. Is it true that the factor group$G/S$contains an abelian subgroup of index bounded by a function of~$k$? { A.\,V.\,Vasil'ev} Yes, it is true (A.\,A....

reiAssessment.solveRationale: Group theory VI_BRIDGING; Rei not specialized in group theory (yet)
reiAssessment.formalizationNotes: Kourovka problems are typically research-level group theory
